hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); sys.exit(1 if ('.env' in f.split('/')[-1] and not f.endswith('.example') and not f.endswith('.local')) else 0)"

bash -c 'f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$f" == *.tsx || "$f" == *.ts ]] && [[ "$f" == /var/www/truxz/src/* ]]; then cd /var/www/truxz && timeout 30 npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | grep -E "error TS" | head -3; fi; true'
